acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_f001] PASS if the revised sections anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:411 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:489 include at least one fully rendered casualty interaction with sensory detail plus a consequential decision/action; FAIL if escalation remains conveyed only through numeric summaries and list totals.

[chapter_15_f002] PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:259 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:277 contains at least two distinct interior beats attributable to Ina embedded in-scene; FAIL if the stretch remains external action/dialogue only.

[chapter_15_f003] PASS if, in the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:157 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:411, no more than two consecutive paragraphs begin with explicit clock stamps and at least two transitions are driven by action/sensory movement rather than timestamp headers; FAIL otherwise.

[chapter_15_f004] PASS if at least three failed-contact beats in the revised line cluster use clearly different failure mechanics and no more than one instance retains the exact "There was no answer" construction; FAIL if three or more beats remain near-identical in syntax and effect.

[FBR-002] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6364-6371 no longer hard-codes a child profile that conflicts with chapter 7. Fail if the chapter still states an incompatible dependent composition.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised sections anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:411 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:489 include at least one fully rendered casualty interaction with sensory detail plus a consequential decision/action; FAIL if escalation remains conveyed only through numeric summaries and list totals.
findings.problem: As the death toll climbs, the chapter shifts into count reporting and list architecture; consequence is increasingly delivered as totals instead of embodied scene pressure. This is sanitization drift (summary replacing scene) at the exact cost inflection point.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:411 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:489 by replacing at least one count-only update cluster with a grounded casualty micro-scene (for example, a family receiving a confirmed name, a failed transfer attempt, or an injury triage decision in the church) that keeps the ledger function but restores physical and emotional consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:259 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:277 contains at least two distinct interior beats attributable to Ina embedded in-scene; FAIL if the stretch remains external action/dialogue only.
findings.problem: From the van departure through first intake-desk exchange, the focalization runs externally for 10 consecutive paragraphs with no explicit Ina interiority (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment), flattening close-third into procedural coverage.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the span beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:259 and running through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:277, add 2-3 brief interior beats for Ina (somatic stress cue, memory trigger, or tactical self-assessment) between logistics actions and dialogue so the scene remains anchored in her consciousness.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:157 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:411, no more than two consecutive paragraphs begin with explicit clock stamps and at least two transitions are driven by action/sensory movement rather than timestamp headers; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: Clock-stamp paragraph openings ("At HH:MM" / "By HH:MM") recur so frequently that they become a visible prose template, reducing rhythmic variation and making key beats feel mechanically logged.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep essential timeline anchors but vary transitions in and around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:157, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:163, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:411, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:431, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:489 by integrating time cues into action/sensory clauses instead of repeated timestamp-leading openings.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least three failed-contact beats in the revised line cluster use clearly different failure mechanics and no more than one instance retains the exact "There was no answer" construction; FAIL if three or more beats remain near-identical in syntax and effect.
findings.problem: The communication-failure beat repeats with near-identical syntax ("There was no answer" and adjacent null-delivery phrasing), which reads as formula repetition rather than escalating pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the failed-contact cluster at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:73, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:185 (with snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:139 as support) so each miss is rendered through a distinct failure mode tied to stakes (ringout cutoff, delayed receipt, relay distortion, wrong-party pickup, etc.).

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6364-6371 no longer hard-codes a child profile that conflicts with chapter 7. Fail if the chapter still states an incompatible dependent composition.
findings.problem: Cross-chapter continuity break: this chapter states Minjae's sister has two daughters, conflicting with chapter 7's earlier dependent description. The contradiction lands inside the novel's emotional crisis center and reads as parallel-draft mismatch.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6364-6371 to align dependent details with the established canon. If upstream canon remains uncertain, make the line specificity-neutral while preserving urgency (missing caregiver + separated dependents + immediate stakes).

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when stakes demand it: show coercion mechanics, sexual negotiation, grief rituals, and financial desperation at scene level. In edge cases, prefer precision over decorum; protect character dignity through perspective accuracy, not by omitting the hard material.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene requires bodily, economic, or moral consequence and the draft retreats into abstract phrasing, rewrite with concrete action, sensation, and decision impact before proceeding.
aesthetic_risk_policy.operational_resolution_rule: When uncertain between tasteful distance and narrative truth, choose the version that preserves causal accountability and embodied consequence, then tune language for clarity rather than softness.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, legal language, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter structures deliberately: high-density dialogue vs interior reflection, multi-scene public collision vs two-scene intimate pressure, aftermath inventory vs anticipatory dread. Never let two consecutive chapters share the same pacing architecture or turn mechanism.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsentimental literary diction that permits technical vocabulary, profanity, and class-marked speech without flattening idiolects.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person centered on Seo Ina, with brief controlled widenings in public-event chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternating pressure waves: compressed clauses in operational stress, longer breath-based lines in grief and reflection.
